roa.docketEntryComment: /X:SHARON DOW PRESENT; APD OFFICER TORRANCE BYNUM PRESENT DURING IN CHAMBERSDISCUSSIONS ONLY,/MO:TO VACATE PROTECTIVE ORDER AND MODIFY PROBATION/X:DISCUSSIONS HELD IN CHAMBERS,/X:PROBATION AND PROTECTIVE ORDER WILL BE MODIFIED IN STAGES AS FOLLOWS://X:PROTECTIVE ORDER IS MODIFIED TO ALLOW PARTIES TO COMMUNICATE WITH EACH OTHER BY TELEPHONE ONLY REGARDING SETTING UP JOINT COUNSELING SESSIONS ONLY,//X:ONCE PARTIES HAVE BEEN ACCEPTED INTO A PROGRAM, WRITTEN PROOF IS TO BESUBMITTED TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT,/X:AT THAT TIME, THE PROTECTIVEORDER WILL AUTOMATICALLY BE FURTHER MODIFIED TO ALLOW ATTENDANCE AT COUNSELING SESSIONS,/X:THE PARTIES ARE TO ARRIVE FOR COUNSELING SEPARATELY AND LEAVE SEPARATELY,/X:COURT ADMONISHES DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH TERMS OF PROTECTIVE ORDER,/X:PEOPLE DID OPPOSE MODIFICATION OF PROTECTIVE ORDER, BUT ONTHIS ONE ISSUE OF JOINT COUNSELING, THERE IS NO OBJECTION,/

/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEF:ADMITS VIOLATION OF PROBATION/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/CTWP:120/PJ:1 YEAR/ADDL CTS:51/PGM11//X:SENTENCE MAY ALSO BE SERVED IN A DRUG AND DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRAM THROUGH VETERANS ADMINISTRATION AT TREASURE ISLAND,/PROB EXT:06-02-2003/
/X:MS, SHARON DOW PRESENT AND ADVISED OF RIGHT TO COUNSEL AND CONSEQUENCES OF PLACING HERSELF UNDER THE COURT'S JURISDICTION,/X:STAY AWAY ORDER REMAINS IN EFFECT AS TO BOTH PARTIES,/CONTD TS DA MTR
CONTD SUPP RPT ON DA MTR/DA-MTR/SUPP:05-10-02/PROB ADM REV/SHER/
CONTD SUPP RPT ON APD MTR/APD-MTR/SUPP:03-05-01/SHER/
/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS 1/REMA/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:05-30-00/
/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAW/DEFTARR/
